name: opportunities.candidates.weekly-jobs-digest
description: Every Monday 08:00 UTC: emit one candidates.weekly_jobs_digest.v1 event per logged-in candidate who has not finished checkout. Each event carries the top-10 freshest jobs filtered by the candidate's country + opted-in kinds plus headline analytics for the past 7 days. The notification service consumes the topic and sends the re-engagement email.

steps.name: Invoke weekly jobs digest for unpaid candidates
